seo.meta_title: Best Descope Alternatives for Next.js Developers (2026)
seo.meta_description: Looking for alternatives to Descope? Compare the top Next.js auth tools — Clerk, Kinde, Better Auth — and find the right fit for your project.
seo.og_title: Best Alternatives to Descope for Next.js
seo.og_description: Top Descope alternatives ranked by Next.js integration score, pricing, and developer experience.

hero.headline: Best Descope Alternatives for Next.js (2026)
hero.subheadline: Descope not quite right? Here are the top alternatives, ranked by how well they integrate with Next.js App Router.

intro_paragraphs: Descope is a solid choice for Next.js authentication — descope is a visual-first authentication platform that lets you build auth flows with a drag-and-drop workflow editor. But depending on your budget, team size, or feature requirements, one of these alternatives might be a better fit.

faq.question: Why would I choose something over Descope?
faq.answer: While Descope scores 7/10 for Next.js integration, other tools may offer better pricing at scale (Free – $2,000/mo with Yes, up to 5,000 MAU with 2,000 transactions), different learning curves, or features that Descope lacks such as expensive at scale - pricing jumps at 10k mau, visual builder adds abstraction that can be limiting for custom flows.
